message:
Running command: # Check what simulators are available
which iverilog 2>/dev/null && iverilog -V 2>&1 | head -3
which verilator 2>/dev/null && verilator --version 2>/dev/null | head -3
which vcs 2>/dev/null || echo "vcs not found"
which xrun 2>/dev/null || echo "xrun not found"
which questa 2>/dev/null || echo "questa not found"
echo "---"
# Check RISC-V toolchain
which riscv32-unknown-elf-gcc 2>/dev/null || echo "riscv32-unknown-elf-gcc not found"
# Check what the tb filelist says
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f | head -30
